tests.name: Men's Enhanced Hormone Panel
tests.description: A specialized panel designed for men seeking an advanced hormone assessment, including additional markers for enhanced optimization of health and performance.
tests.indication: Measures Total & Free Testosterone, Estradiol, SHBG, Prolactin, DHEA-S, Cortisol, PSA, TSH, Free T3, Free T4, IGF-1, Lipid Panel, CBC, Metabolic Panel, HbA1c, Fasting Insulin, and Vitamin D and more.

medications.name: Tadalafil (Generic Cialis) Tablet
medications.dosing: EMP-6: 5 mg; EMP-8: 10 mg; EMP-10: 20 mg; VPI-144: (T1); 20 mg
medications.description: A PDE-5 medication used in sexual-health protocols to support nitric-oxide mediated blood-flow response and confidence in sexual performance.
medications.indication: May fit clients with erectile-function or blood-flow related sexual concerns after review of cardiovascular history, blood pressure, nitrate use, and medication interactions.

supplements.name: Health Essential Bundle (Multi, Vitamin D, Omega)
supplements.description: Support your health with this essential trio: Vitamin D3 + K2 for strong bones, immunity, and mood balance, a high-quality multivitamin to fill nutritional gaps, and Omega-3s for heart, brain, and anti-inflammatory support. Optimize your wellness with these foundational nutrients!
supplements.indication: Designed to support bone strength, immune function, heart health, and overall vitality.
